words.example: He has an advantage in experience.

words.meaning: a relationship or link between people or things
words.example: The article explains the connection between sleep and memory.

words.meaning: money that you spend on something
words.example: Travel is our biggest expense this month.

words.meaning: goods sent from one place to another
words.example: The shipment arrived two days later than expected.

words.meaning: the part or responsibility someone has in a situation
words.example: He understood his role in the team.

words.meaning: an opinion or way of thinking about something
words.example: She shared her view during the class discussion.

words.meaning: a choice you make after thinking
words.example: Her decision to study abroad surprised us.

words.meaning: something that tells people about possible danger or trouble
words.example: The weather warning told people to stay indoors.

words.meaning: the most important or central part of something
words.example: Trust is at the core of a good team.
